symptom: a birthmark down one leg since infancy and a limb that aches after long days on their feet
hook: dozens of small round stones were scattered through the soft tissue of the limb like dropped pebbles
whatYouSee: Dozens of small round calcified stones scattered through the soft tissue of the limb like a handful of dropped pebbles.
whyItMatters: Malformed veins under the skin slowly clot in small pockets and each pocket calcifies into its own tiny stone called a phlebolith.
treatment: Compression stockings and supportive care manage the veins and targeted procedures treat the worst malformations.
takeaway: A birthmark can come with its own hidden gravel.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a birthmark down one leg since infancy and a limb that aches after long days on their feet.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And dozens of small round stones were scattered through the soft tissue of the limb like dropped pebbles.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Klippel-Trenaunay syndrome

👀 What you see:
Dozens of small round calcified stones scattered through the soft tissue of the limb like a handful of dropped pebbles.

🦴 Why it matters:
Malformed veins under the skin slowly clot in small pockets and each pocket calcifies into its own tiny stone called a phlebolith.

💊 Treatment:
Compression stockings and supportive care manage the veins and targeted procedures treat the worst malformations.

laypersonQuestion: Why are there pebbles inside a living leg?
seedHint: Count the little round shadows and ask yourself if bone or something else made them
